description_long: This is a rounded ceramic vase with a wide, bulbous body and a gently flared rim. The upper half of the vase features a glossy, dark green glaze that transitions into a textured, mottled pattern, evoking the look of moss or lichen. The lower portion is a smooth, off-white or light beige, providing a striking contrast to the darker upper section. The surface finish is highly reflective, suggesting a glazed ceramic material. The vase's opening is wide enough to accommodate medium-sized floral arrangements or decorative branches. There are no visible handles or additional adornments, giving it a simple yet elegant appearance.
description: A glossy, rounded ceramic vase with a dark green, mottled upper half and a smooth, light beige lower half. The wide opening and reflective glaze give it a simple, elegant look.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from the front, showing the full transition from the dark green, textured upper glaze to the smooth, light lower half.
description_view_1: This view highlights the mottled green glaze and the gentle curve of the vase's body, with the rim and opening clearly visible.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the rounded shape and the even distribution of the green and beige color zones.
description_view_3: The vase's back view shows the continuity of the mottled glaze and the smooth lower section, with no visible seams or handles.
